summary: I ran the project's standard test and lint commands against the dashboard implementation. `bin/rails test` (with `PARALLEL_WORKERS=1`, since this host's default forking test runner crashes independent of app code) passed all 213 model/controller/service/query tests with 0 failures/errors, and `bin/rubocop` found no offenses across 152 files. The two new system-test files couldn't run because this machine's installed chromedriver (v122) doesn't match the installed Chrome (v150) — a pre-existing local tooling mismatch, not something introduced by this change — so I noted that limitation in the summary rather than treating it as a code defect. No development/production database commands were touched; everything ran against the isolated `pipeliner_test` database. I wrote a `pass` verdict with no findings to `.pipeliner/phases/03-build/main/test-critic/verdict.json`.
